evidence_level: static contracts plus attempted iOS 26.5 runtime tests
canonical_repository_runtime_test: blocked: xcodebuild test runner stalled after build and was terminated

metric_notes.lost_content: A unit assertion exists, but the current QA run did not reach test execution; zero is not claimed.
metric_notes.orphaned_content: ContentRepository.guideItems() exposes published objects in memory, but RootGuideView does not render that collection.
metric_notes.unsearchable_content: AppSearchEngine.searchContent() indexes canonical items, but SearchView displays a separate legacy/direct-results pipeline.
metric_notes.profile_blocked_content: Confirmed by static policy: PersonaContentPolicy and RelatedContentEngine return universal visibility; profile only boosts ordering. Static persona QA passed.

coverage_contracts.guide: FAIL: canonical repository is not the data source of RootGuideView
coverage_contracts.search: FAIL: canonical search is not the displayed SearchView pipeline
coverage_contracts.deep_link: FAIL: generated younew://content/<id> links have no content route in AppNavigationResolver or onOpenURL handler
coverage_contracts.saved: PARTIAL: persistence stores ID and timestamp only, but canonical rows without legacyDestination are not navigable
coverage_contracts.map: FAIL: ContentRepository.mapItems() is not consumed by the root Map UI
